$comment: Asset manifest for the Delphi-OBD design-time package.
Each entry produces one PNG under assets/designtime/. The
generator script (generate.py) calls OpenAI's image API with
model 'gpt-image-2' and writes the result to <out>.
Conventions:
- 'kind' is informational; the script doesn't branch on it.
- 'size' is whatever gpt-image-2 supports natively (square
sizes only). The script downscales to 'final_size' with
Lanczos resampling. Component icons end at 256 px; RAD
Studio downscales to 16/24/32 itself for the palette.
- References (top-level) are POSTed to /v1/images/edits as
multipart 'image[]' fields so gpt-image-2 anchors style
on the brand logo.
Style guide for prompts (keep consistent across icons):
- Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI icon style: 2D
with subtle depth — slight isometric / dimetric tilt,
soft layered shading, clean geometric shapes. Modern
and recognisable, not flat-flat and not photoreal.
- Use ONLY colours that appear in the attached reference
logo. Don't enumerate them in the prompt — let the
model lift the palette directly from the reference.
- White background.
- Centered subject, even padding, no text.

assets.prompt: Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI style icon for a vehicle diagnostics software component named 'TOBDConnection'. Subject: a stylised OBD-II 16-pin trapezoidal diagnostic connector with a short cable curling out the back. 2D with subtle depth, slight isometric perspective, soft layered shading, clean geometric shapes. Use ONLY colours from the attached reference logo. Pure white background. Centered composition, generous padding. No text. Clean enough to read at 16x16 px after downscaling.

Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI style icon for 'TOBDAdapter'. Subject: a small ELM327-style USB / Bluetooth diagnostic dongle adapter — rectangular module with a short tail cable and a round status LED. The adapter casing must be COMPLETELY BLANK — no logo, no brand mark, no emblem, no text, no decals printed on the body. The reference image is provided ONLY as a colour palette source; do not copy or place any element from it onto the adapter. 2D with subtle depth, slight isometric perspective, soft layered shading. Use ONLY colours from the attached reference logo. Pure white background. Centered, generous padding. No text. Reads at 16x16 px after downscaling.

Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI style icon for 'TOBDProtocol'. Subject: three or four stacked horizontal layers (a protocol stack) connected by short vertical bidirectional arrows on the side, suggesting layered communication. 2D with subtle depth, slight isometric perspective, soft layered shading, clean geometry. Use ONLY colours from the attached reference logo. Pure white background. Centered, generous padding. No text. Reads at 16x16 px.

Subject: an Ethernet RJ45 plug with a short cable, paired with a small abstract car silhouette or vehicle outline behind it, suggesting network diagnostics. 2D with subtle depth, slight isometric perspective, soft layered shading. Use ONLY colours from the attached reference logo. Pure white background. Centered, generous padding. No text. Reads at 16x16 px.

Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI style icon for 'TOBDCodingSession' — represents an active diagnostic coding session in a software development tool. IMPORTANT: the attached reference image is provided ONLY as a colour palette source. DO NOT depict, copy, or include any element of the reference logo in the output. Subject: a stylised laptop or rounded display window opened to show a few horizontal lines of code, with a small green/orange play indicator dot in the corner suggesting an active session. 2D with subtle depth, slight isometric perspective, soft layered shading. Use ONLY colours from the attached reference logo. Pure white background. Centered, generous padding. No text. Reads at 16x16 px.

Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI style template icon — a heraldic shield with a small closed padlock overlapping the lower-right corner. Shield outlined in metallic silver with a charcoal interior. EMPTY SHIELD CENTRE — leave the central area completely blank, so it can be overlaid with a brand emblem in a follow-up step. 2D with subtle depth, slight isometric perspective, soft layered shading. Use ONLY colours from the attached reference logo. Pure white background. Centered, generous padding. No text. No glyph in the shield centre. Clean Fluent style.

Take the attached shield-with-padlock icon (silver shield, charcoal interior, lower-right padlock, white background, Fluent / Office style) and place the official Volkswagen logo centered on the shield's empty face. The Volkswagen logo is very specific: two clean sans-serif letters — a 'V' stacked directly above a 'W' so they share their middle vertical strokes, both letters are bold, geometric, and rendered in flat white inside a perfect blue circular ring with a thin white outer border. The V's tip points down to meet the W's centre tip; the top of the V touches the inner ring. Render the logo crisply and accurately — it must be unmistakably the real Volkswagen mark, not a generic V-over-W. Keep the shield, padlock, framing, perspective, shading, and white background EXACTLY as in the attached reference — only add the Volkswagen logo centered on the shield. Output 1024x1024 PNG.

Take the attached shield-with-padlock icon (silver shield, charcoal interior, lower-right padlock, white background, Fluent / Office style) and place a recognizable BMW circular roundel logo (quartered blue and white inside a black ring) centered on the shield's empty face. Keep the shield, padlock, framing, perspective, shading, and white background EXACTLY as in the attached reference — only add the BMW roundel centered on the shield. The roundel may use its standard colours so it stays recognizable. No text outside the roundel. Output 1024x1024 PNG.

Take the attached shield-with-padlock icon (silver shield, charcoal interior, lower-right padlock, white background, Fluent / Office style) and place a recognizable Mercedes-Benz three-pointed-star logo inside a circular ring centered on the shield's empty face. Keep the shield, padlock, framing, perspective, shading, and white background EXACTLY as in the attached reference — only add the Mercedes star-in-ring centered on the shield. The star may use its standard silver / chrome colours so it stays recognizable. No text. Output 1024x1024 PNG.

Take the attached shield-with-padlock icon (silver shield, charcoal interior, lower-right padlock, white background, Fluent / Office style) and place the iconic letter 'A' from the official Stellantis corporate logo centered on the shield's empty face — rendered EXACTLY as it appears in the real Stellantis wordmark. The Stellantis 'A' is unmistakable: a tall, modern, sans-serif uppercase letter with two converging legs that DO NOT meet at a sharp point — instead the apex is flat, and the right leg has a soft inward slant near the top creating a subtle curve / tilt at the very top of the letter. No crossbar. Rendered in the official Stellantis deep navy blue. DO NOT include any other letters, NO S-T-E-L-L-N-T-I-S wordmark, no other characters — only the single iconic Stellantis 'A' as it actually appears in the brand's logo, sized to fill most of the shield's interior height. Keep the shield, padlock, framing, perspective, shading, and white background EXACTLY as in the attached reference. Output 1024x1024 PNG.

A clean RAD Studio IDE splash-screen graphic for the 'Delphi-OBD' design-time package. Subject: the attached reference logo, sized prominently and centered, with a thin horizontal accent line beneath it. Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI style — 2D with subtle depth, soft layered shading. Use ONLY colours from the attached reference logo. Pure white background. Generous breathing space around the logo. No text — text is composited at runtime by the package. Sharp at the size used by RAD Studio's splash-screen plugin slot.
